title: AshA2ui Extension Catalog
description: Client functions AshA2ui servers may invoke beyond the v1.0 basic catalog. Load it alongside the basic catalog (the shipped hook registers the implementations as built-ins). Currently: downloadFile, the frozen file-export delivery contract (see AshA2ui.Export).

downloadFile.description: Downloads a server-generated file: exactly one of dataUrl (an inline data: URL — how AshA2ui delivers CSV exports) or url (a signed download URL, for hosts that upload instead of inlining), saved under filename. This function has no return value.

filename.description: The name the downloaded file is saved under.

mimeType.description: The file's MIME type (informational; the URL's own type wins where applicable).

dataUrl.description: The file content as a data: URL.

url.description: A (signed) URL the file is downloaded from.

iconUrl.description: A URL for an image that identifies the agent or tool associated with the surface.

agentDisplayName.description: Text to be displayed next to the surface to identify the agent or tool that created it.
